Example_EN: We were delighted with the warm welcome.
Example_CN: 我们对热情的欢迎感到高兴。

Collocation: deliver a package;deliver a speech;deliver to
Example_EN: The postman will deliver the package tomorrow.
Example_CN: 邮递员明天会递送包裹。

Example_EN: We ordered pizza with free home delivery.
Example_CN: 我们订了免费送餐上门的披萨。

Example_EN: Good teachers are always in demand at schools.
Example_CN: 好老师在学校总是很抢手。

Example_EN: Students used a democratic process to choose a leader.
Example_CN: 学生用民主程序选出领袖。

Example_EN: Please demonstrate how to open this new software.
Example_CN: 请演示如何打开这个新软件。

Example_EN: There was a peaceful demonstration in the city centre.
Example_CN: 市中心有一场和平示威。

Example_EN: He did not deny that he had made a mistake.
Example_CN: 他不否认自己犯了错。

Example_EN: The train will depart from platform three at noon.
Example_CN: 火车中午从三号站台出发。

Example_EN: She works in the sales department of a bank.
Example_CN: 她在银行销售部工作。

Example_EN: Please check the departure time on the screen.
Example_CN: 请在屏幕上核对出发时间。

Example_EN: Success will depend on how hard you practise.
Example_CN: 成功取决于你练习得多努力。

Example_EN: Young children are dependent on their parents.
Example_CN: 幼儿依赖父母。

Example_EN: You must pay a deposit to book the flat.
Example_CN: 预订公寓必须支付押金。

Example_EN: Bad news can depress even cheerful people.
Example_CN: 坏消息甚至会让开朗的人沮丧。

Example_EN: He felt depressed after failing the important exam.
Example_CN: 重要考试失败后他感到沮丧。

Example_EN: She sought help after a long period of depression.
Example_CN: 长期抑郁后她寻求了帮助。

Example_EN: We discussed the problem in depth after class.
Example_CN: 课后我们深入讨论了这个问题。

Example_EN: Many English words derive from Latin roots.
Example_CN: 许多英语单词源自拉丁词根。

Collocation: describe as;describe in detail;hard to describe
Example_EN: Can you describe the man you saw last night?
Example_CN: 你能描述昨晚看见的那个人吗？

Example_EN: Please write a short description of your hometown.
Example_CN: 请写一段关于家乡的简短描述。

Example_EN: Camels can live in the hot desert for days.
Example_CN: 骆驼能在炎热沙漠中生活数日。
MemoryTip: 名词 ˈdezət 沙漠；动词 dɪˈzɜːt 抛弃。

Example_EN: You deserve a rest after such hard work.
Example_CN: 这么努力工作后你应得休息。

Example_EN: She wants to study fashion design at college.
Example_CN: 她想在大学学服装设计。

Example_EN: The fashion designer showed her new collection.
Example_CN: 时装设计师展示了她的新系列。

Example_EN: He has a strong desire to learn Chinese.
Example_CN: 他有强烈愿望学习中文。

Example_EN: They made a desperate attempt to save the company.
Example_CN: 他们拼命试图挽救公司。

Example_EN: Despite the rain, we finished the outdoor match.
Example_CN: 尽管下雨，我们仍完成了户外比赛。
MemoryTip: despite 后直接加名词，不加 of。

Example_EN: Would you like ice cream for dessert tonight?
Example_CN: 今晚甜点你想吃冰淇淋吗？
MemoryTip: dessert：餐后甜点；勿与 desert 混淆。

Example_EN: Paris is a popular destination for summer travel.
Example_CN: 巴黎是暑期旅行的热门目的地。

Example_EN: The fire destroyed several houses in the street.
Example_CN: 大火烧毁了街上几栋房屋。

Example_EN: The storm caused the destruction of many trees.
Example_CN: 风暴导致许多树木被毁。

Example_EN: Please explain the plan in detail after lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭后请详细解释计划。

Example_EN: She wrote a detailed report about the visit.
Example_CN: 她写了一份关于访问的详细报告。

Collocation: detect a problem;detect a smell;hard to detect
Example_EN: The machine can detect smoke in the kitchen.
Example_CN: 机器能探测厨房里的烟雾。

Example_EN: Her determination to succeed impressed everyone.
Example_CN: 她要成功的决心打动了所有人。

Collocation: determine to;determine the cause;hard to determine
Example_EN: We need to determine the cause of the delay.
Example_CN: 我们需要确定延误的原因。

Example_EN: She is determined to pass the exam this time.
Example_CN: 她决心这次通过考试。

Example_EN: Children develop new skills every school year.
Example_CN: 孩子们每个学年都发展新技能。

Example_EN: The development of the new park will take months.
Example_CN: 新公园的开发将花费数月。

Example_EN: Please turn off electronic devices during the flight.
Example_CN: 飞行期间请关闭电子设备。

Example_EN: She devoted many hours to practising the piano.
Example_CN: 她投入许多小时练习钢琴。

Example_EN: Please draw a diagram of the water cycle.
Example_CN: 请画一幅水循环示意图。

Example_EN: Please dial this number if you need help.
Example_CN: 需要帮助请拨打这个号码。

Example_EN: The film has funny dialogue between the two friends.
Example_CN: 电影里两位朋友有有趣的对白。

Example_EN: She wore a diamond ring on her left hand.
Example_CN: 她左手戴着一枚钻石戒指。

Collocation: keep a diary;diary entry;in the diary
Example_EN: She keeps a diary of her daily school life.
Example_CN: 她用日记记录日常学校生活。

Example_EN: Their views differ from ours on this point.
Example_CN: 在这一点上他们的看法与我们不同。

Example_EN: She thinks differently from most of her classmates.
Example_CN: 她想问题的方式与多数同学不同。

Example_EN: He had difficulty understanding the long text.
Example_CN: 他理解这篇长文有困难。

Example_EN: Please dig a hole for the new tree this spring.
Example_CN: 请今年春天为新树挖一个坑。

Example_EN: Most students use digital cameras on their phones.
Example_CN: 多数学生用手机上的数码相机。

Example_EN: The project adds a new dimension to our work.
Example_CN: 这个项目为我们的工作增加了新维度。

Example_EN: Is there a direct flight from London to Tokyo?
Example_CN: 从伦敦到东京有直飞吗？

Collocation: in the direction;ask for directions;change direction
Example_EN: Can you give me directions to the nearest bank?
Example_CN: 你能告诉我去最近银行怎么走吗？

Example_EN: Please go directly to the teacher's office now.
Example_CN: 请现在直接去老师办公室。

Example_EN: The film director talked to the actors before filming.
Example_CN: 电影导演开拍前与演员交谈。

Example_EN: Please wipe the dirt off your shoes outside.
Example_CN: 请在门外擦掉鞋上的泥土。

Collocation: physical disability;disability rights;learn with a disability
Example_EN: The school supports students with a disability.
Example_CN: 学校为有残疾的学生提供支持。

Example_EN: The new building has disabled access to every floor.
Example_CN: 新楼每层都有无障碍通道。

Example_EN: The main disadvantage of this plan is the cost.
Example_CN: 这个计划的主要缺点是成本。

Example_EN: I disagree with you on this point.
Example_CN: 在这一点上我不同意你。

Example_EN: There was disagreement about the best meeting time.
Example_CN: 关于最佳开会时间存在分歧。

Example_EN: The keys seem to disappear every school morning.
Example_CN: 每个上学日早上钥匙好像都会失踪。

Example_EN: I do not want to disappoint my parents again.
Example_CN: 我不想再次让父母失望。

Example_EN: She felt disappointed with her exam results.
Example_CN: 她对自己的考试成绩感到失望。

Example_EN: The team’s performance was disappointing last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚球队表现令人失望。

Example_EN: Floods are a common natural disaster in this region.
Example_CN: 洪水是这一地区常见自然灾害。

Example_EN: He bought a music disc of his favourite band.
Example_CN: 他买了一张最爱乐队的音乐唱片。
MemoryTip: 英式常 disc；电脑存储偏 disk。

Example_EN: Self discipline helps students finish homework on time.
Example_CN: 自律帮助学生按时完成作业。

Example_EN: Students get a special discount on train tickets.
Example_CN: 学生买火车票有特别折扣。

Example_EN: Scientists discovered a new planet last year.
Example_CN: 科学家去年发现了一颗新行星。

Example_EN: The discovery of oil changed the country’s economy.
Example_CN: 石油的发现改变了该国经济。

Example_EN: The new rule is still under discussion this week.
Example_CN: 新规定本周仍在讨论中。

Example_EN: Exercise can help prevent some types of disease.
Example_CN: 锻炼有助于预防某些疾病。

Example_EN: There was a disgusting smell in the rubbish bin.
Example_CN: 垃圾桶里有令人恶心的气味。

Example_EN: Please save the file to the computer’s hard disk.
Example_CN: 请把文件存到电脑硬盘。
MemoryTip: disk：电脑磁盘（美式拼写更常见）。

Example_EN: I dislike waiting in long queues at the shop.
Example_CN: 我讨厌在商店排长队。

Collocation: dismiss a class;dismiss an idea;dismiss from
Example_EN: The teacher will dismiss the class at three.
Example_CN: 老师三点下课解散。

Example_EN: Books lay in disorder across his bedroom floor.
Example_CN: 书在他卧室地板上乱成一团。

Example_EN: The new paintings are on display in the hall.
Example_CN: 新画作正在大厅展出。

Example_EN: What is the distance from your house to school?
Example_CN: 从你家到学校有多远？

Example_EN: We could see distant mountains across the valley.
Example_CN: 我们能看见山谷对面远处的山。

Example_EN: Her voice is distinct from everyone else’s.
Example_CN: 她的声音与其他人明显不同。

Example_EN: We must make a clear distinction between the two ideas.
Example_CN: 我们必须把这两个概念清楚区分开。
MemoryTip: distinct → distinction：区别，也指标志性荣誉。

Example_EN: Can you distinguish between these two similar colours?
Example_CN: 你能区分这两种相似颜色吗？

Example_EN: Teachers distribute books at the start of term.
Example_CN: 学期初老师分发教材。

Example_EN: The distribution of food helped families after the flood.
Example_CN: 洪水后食物分发帮助了各家各户。

Example_EN: They live in a quiet district near the river.
Example_CN: 他们住在河边一个安静的区。

Collocation: disturb someone;disturb the peace;sorry to disturb
Example_EN: Sorry to disturb you, but the phone is for you.
Example_CN: 抱歉打扰，有你的电话。

Example_EN: Children love to dive into the swimming pool.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢跳进游泳池。

Example_EN: Our class is a diverse group of students.
Example_CN: 我们班是多样化的学生群体。

Example_EN: The city is famous for its cultural diversity.
Example_CN: 这座城市以文化多样性闻名。

Example_EN: Please divide the class into four small groups.
Example_CN: 请把全班分成四个小组。

Example_EN: There is a clear division of work in our team.
Example_CN: 我们队里有明确的分工。

Collocation: get a divorce;divorce from;after the divorce
Example_EN: They decided to get a divorce after many years.
Example_CN: 多年后他们决定离婚。

Example_EN: Please bring an official document with your photo.
Example_CN: 请带一份有照片的正式证件。

Example_EN: We watched a documentary about wild animals.
Example_CN: 我们看了一部关于野生动物的纪录片。

Example_EN: The book costs about ten dollars in this shop.
Example_CN: 这本书在这家店大约要十美元。
MemoryTip: dollar：美元或其他以元为单位的货币。

Example_EN: A domestic flight is usually cheaper than an international one.
Example_CN: 国内航班通常比国际航班便宜。
